name: CLARIVATE PLC
business: Clarivate is a leading global provider of transformative intelligence, supporting the entire innovation lifecycle. It offers intelligence solutions, workflow solutions, and tech-enabled services to customers in the Academia & Government, Intellectual Property, and Life Sciences & Healthcare end markets.
sellsTo: pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device companies

exposures.sentence: We have developed and continue to develop AI research assistants and agents to enhance customer adoption and retention, unlock new revenue streams, and extend platform reach.

catalysts.event: Redemption of remaining Senior Secured Notes due 2026
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we redeemed the remaining $100.0 of our outstanding Senior Secured Notes due 2026, plus accrued and unpaid interest through the January 30, 2026 redemption date.
